Assume there are no duplicate numbers in each list. (a) When will the worst case happen? (b) In the worst case, how many item comparison operations will be made? (c) Give the worst-case time complexity of subset as a function of the lengths of the two lists. (d) Write down the worst-case time complexity in asymptotic notations in terms of the lengths of the two lists. 4-1 Q2 Find the number of print called in the following functions. Write down its time complexity in Θ notation in terms of N. Hint: For repetition structure, compute the number of inner loops and outer loops. For recursive structure, write down the number of print W(N) in terms of W(N-1). Then use backward substitutions or forward substitutions to express W(N) in terms of N.
